The '''crystal axe''' is an item used in [[Woodcutting]]. It requires level 71 Woodcutting and [[Song of the Elves]] to create and use, with 50 [[Agility]] and 70 [[Attack]] required to wield it. It possesses the same [[special attack]] as the [[dragon axe]], and gives the player a 15% increase in efficiency chopping logs over the [[rune axe]], surpassing the 10% increase of the dragon axe. This makes the crystal axe approximately 4.5% faster than the dragon axe.

Players can create a crystal axe via a [[singing bowl]] by combining a dragon axe, 120 [[crystal shard]]s and a [[crystal tool seed]]. Doing so requires level 76 [[Smithing]]{{Boostable|yes}} and 76 [[Crafting]]{{Boostable|yes}} to [[Crystal singing|sing]] the crystal, and grants 6,000 experience in both skills. Players can configure the charges while the axe is in their bank by right-clicking on Configure-Charges, as long as players have the required materials. If the player does not meet the Smithing and Crafting requirements, they can have [[Conwenna]] or [[Reese]] sing the crystal for them for an extra 60 crystal shards, for a total of 180.

After creation, the player can revert the crystal axe into a dragon axe. This process returns the crystal tool seed and the dragon axe to the player, but all crystal shards used to create or charge the axe are lost.

A dangerous death in PvP causes the crystal axe to revert to a dragon axe, which will then be dropped for the killer. All crystal shards will be lost should this happen.

==Special attack==
[[File:Lumber_Up_(crystal_axe).gif|frame|A player performs the crystal axe's special attack, ''Lumber Up''.]]
The crystal axe has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Lumber Up'', that it shares with the [[dragon axe|dragon]], [[infernal axe|infernal]], and [[3rd age axe|3rd age axes]] and their variants. It [[Temporary skill boost|temporarily boosts]] the player's [[Woodcutting]] level by 3, consuming 100% of the player's special attack energy. The boost degrades every 60 seconds, with the player's Woodcutting level returning to normal after 3 minutes. Using [[Preserve]] can increase the duration by 50%.

Note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1375844352098975753|date=27 March 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98237|archivedate=29 March 2021}}, with visible boosts past level 99 only influencing the [[Pet#Skilling pets|pet]] and [[clue nest]] chances.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1573018832998109185|date=22 September 2022|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102590|archivedate=10 June 2023|quote=The formula for dropping clue nests only benefits from visible boosts. So the +7 invisible one won't help, but a visible boost would help beyond 99 if you can get one.}}

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Crystal axe}}

==Charging==
[[Crystal shard]]s may be used on the axe to add charges beyond the initial 10,000 the axe holds when created, with each shard granting 100 charges, up to a maximum of 20,000. Charges may be added to the axe regardless of whether the axe currently holds charges or is in its inactive, zero-charge state. 

==Charge Consumption==
As with all [[crystal equipment]], one charge of the crystal axe is consumed for each item chopped, except during the following activities where it provides no benefit over other axes:

*Chopping [[crystal trees]] in [[Prifddinas]] to obtain crystal shards
* Chopping [[Tendrils (Tar Swamp)|tendrils]] in the [[Tar Swamp]]
* Chopping [[Tendrils (Abyss)|tendrils]] in the [[Abyss]]
* Chopping [[Light Jungle|light]], [[Medium Jungle|medium]] and [[Dense Jungle|dense jungle]] and fixing the village fence during the [[Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup]] [[minigame]]
* Chopping the [[meat tree]], roots obstacle or [[Sapling (Chambers of Xeric)|saplings]] in the [[Chambers of Xeric]]
* Chopping [[celastrus bark]] from [[Celastrus tree|celastrus trees]]
* Finishing off [[growthling]]s during the fight with [[Bryophyta]]
* Splitting [[arctic pine logs]]

Once the axe's charges have been fully depleted, it can still be used to cut wood, but will act like a [[dragon axe]]. Wearing an [[elven signet]] (or [[Celestial signet]]) while using crystal equipment will provide a 10% chance to not consume charges.

Dismantling a crystal axe will return the dragon axe and [[crystal tool seed]] to the player. All crystal shard charges are lost in the process.

==Development history==
[[File:Crystal axe (The Eyes of Glouphrie).png|100px|left]]
[[File:Crystal axe (The Eyes of Glouphrie) equipped.png|thumb|100px|The version of the axe intended for release with [[The Eyes of Glouphrie]].]]

The crystal axe was originally intended to release in [[2006]] as a reward from the [[The Eyes of Glouphrie]] [[quest]]. For unknown reasons, it was cut before release, leaving the [[crystal saw]] to be the reward instead. Despite this, its models and sound effects remained unused in the game files. The exact mechanics of how this version of the axe was intended to function are unknown, although the name of one of the sound effects associated with it indicates it would use charges like other [[crystal equipment]].

A crystal axe would finally see a release in 2019 alongside the [[Song of the Elves]] [[quest]] after passing [[Poll:Old School Content Poll 64: Song of the Elves|Content Poll 64]].
<gallery>
eyeglo_crystal_axe.ogg|''"eyeglo_crystal_axe"'', a sound effect intended for using the axe.
eyeglo_crystal_axe_crush.ogg|''"eyeglo_crystal_axe_crush"'', a sound effect intended for using the axe's crush attack style in combat.
eyeglo_crystal_axe_slash.ogg|''"eyeglo_crystal_axe_slash"'', a sound effect intended for using the axe's slash attack style in combat.
eyeglo_crystal_axe_recharge.ogg|''"eyeglo_crystal_axe_recharge"'', a sound effect intended for either the axe running out of charges, or recharging it at the [[singing bowl]].
</gallery>

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 5 March 2025
|update = Game Jam: Charges QoL
|change = The Crystal axe supports a bank item option for changing charges.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 18 June 2020
|update = Poll 71 and Darkmeyer Updates
|change = Crystal axe, as well as the [[infernal axe]], can now be used in place of a dragon axe for the [[Clue scroll (master)|master clue]] step in the [[Enchanted Valley]].
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 9 January 2020
|update = Eating in the Bank
|poll = Old School Content Poll 69: Game Improvements
|change = 
*The Woodcutting level requirement to use a crystal axe has been increased from 70 to 71.
*The inactive crystal axe can now be used as a dragon axe.
*Charges from the crystal axe are no longer consumed when using the axe for actions where their effect provides no extra benefits.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}
